commentary_text: The model favors Iran at 48% while the sportsbooks favor Egypt at 44%, a 22-percentage-point gap on the Egypt win probability. This reversal of favorites could reflect recent lineup changes, injury news, or form shifts that the model's last update did not capture, since both sources agree closely on draw likelihood around 30%. The dashboard flags this as a structural disagreement worth monitoring, without asserting which assessment will prove more predictive.
